overall.description: Gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Hogwarts Legacy) showing first-person exploration of a Gothic castle. The player moves through a bathroom with green stalls, crosses a grand hall with tapestries, and enters Professor Fig's Classroom filled with magical artifacts and wooden desks.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle bathroom with green wooden stalls and stone fixtures

events.description: opening carved wooden door with serpent handle and entering the bathroom
turning slightly right to view the stone sinks along the wall

agents.ego_description: opening a heavy carved door and walking down a bathroom corridor lined with green stalls and stone sinks

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with ornate serpent-shaped metal handle
row of green painted wooden bathroom stalls with louvered doors and metal latches
light-colored rectangular stone tiles covering the walls
exposed wooden beam ceiling with Gothic arch supports
white stone sinks mounted on pedestals along the right wall
large decorative stained glass window at the far end with blue and amber panes

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a close-up of an ornate wooden door opening to reveal a castle bathroom. The camera moves forward through a corridor lined with green wooden stalls on the left and stone pedestal sinks on the right. The space features stone tile walls, a wooden beamed ceiling, and warm wall sconce lighting. The camera approaches a stained glass window at the far end before reaching the exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand castle corridor with Gothic stone arches and tapestries

events.description: exiting the bathroom into a large Gothic hall with high vaulted ceilings
turning right to follow the hall toward the classroom entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall toward a classroom entrance, passing stone pillars and wall tapestries

notable_agents.action: person in dark academic robes walking through the hall carrying a bag

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the transition from bathroom to hall
spacious corridor with high vaulted ceilings and stone construction
polished wooden floor planks reflecting the warm lighting
massive stone pillars supporting the vaulted ceiling
large woven wall hanging depicting a robed figure
ornate iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling
wooden door with iron hinges leading to Professor Fig's Classroom

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bathroom through a stone archway, the scene opens into a grand Gothic hall with polished wooden floors and high vaulted ceilings. The camera passes massive stone pillars and a large wall tapestry while approaching an NPC in dark robes walking through the corridor. The segment ends as the camera approaches a wooden door leading to the classroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: Professor Fig's Classroom with long tables and magical artifacts

events.description: entering Professor Fig's Classroom through the wooden door
turning left to examine magical artifacts in glass cases along the wall

agents.ego_description: exploring the classroom interior, examining student desks and magical artifacts on the side tables before approaching the front

notable_agents.action: Professor Fig standing at the front desk near the staircase

entered.detail: large classroom space with high ceilings and warm ambient lighting
long wooden tables with attached bench seating arranged in rows
long ornate red and gold patterned rug running down the center aisle
tall arched windows with Gothic tracery allowing diffused natural light
glass display domes containing preserved magical flowers and specimens
stacks of books and scrolls piled on tables and the floor
large wooden desk with a lit lamp at the front of the classroom
multiple ornate chandeliers with candles hanging from the ceiling
high vaulted ceiling with exposed wooden beams and stone arches

segments.scene_description: Entering the classroom reveals a large Gothic space with long wooden student desks, ornate rugs, and tall stained glass windows. The camera explores the room, passing glass display cases containing magical specimens and piles of books. Warm light from chandeliers and desk lamps illuminates the stone walls and vaulted ceiling as the camera approaches Professor Fig standing at the front near a staircase.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, utilitarian space of a castle bathroom into the expansive grandeur of a Gothic hall and finally into a detailed magical classroom. It begins as an ornate wooden door opens, gliding through a corridor of green wooden stalls and stone pedestal sinks under the warm glow of wall sconces. As the camera passes through a stone archway at the far end, the environment opens into a vast hall characterized by polished wooden floors, massive stone pillars, and towering vaulted ceilings. The scene then shifts toward a wooden door, transitioning from the open corridor into a scholarly sanctuary filled with long student desks, ornate rugs, and glass display cases of magical specimens. Finally, the camera moves through the warm light of chandeliers and desk lamps to approach Professor Fig standing near a staircase at the front of the room.
